# Rejected Approaches

Lessons from PRs that were closed without merging. Agents should read this before proposing changes to avoid repeating failed approaches. Updated weekly by the self-improve workflow.

## Format

```
### <description>
**PR**: <number>
**Date**: YYYY-MM-DD
**Why rejected**: <reason>
**Lesson**: <what to do differently>
```
